videos.title: AI's Role in Software Engineering
videos.description:
What does it mean to be a software engineer in the age of AI?

As AI takes over coding tasks, the role of a software engineer is evolving. It's not about losing your job; it's about embracing what makes you uniquely human. How can you stay relevant in this AI-driven world? Focus on your unique skills and adaptability. The future is uncertain, but your human touch will always be needed.

#SoftwareEngineering
#AI
#CareerGrowth

videos.title: Keep up or get left behind
videos.description:
Keeping up with tech trends? You don't have to!

It's tough to stay updated in the fast-paced world of AI. Instead of trying to track everything, focus on what matters.

Assign team members to monitor specific areas. If something lasts over a month, it’s worth your attention.

In the AIverse, a month is a long time!

#AI #TechTrends #Innovation

videos.title: What the Pope Actually Said About AI
videos.description:
Anthropic's Mythos and Project Glasswing exposed thousands of high‑severity software vulnerabilities and shifted the bottleneck to human triage and patching. Governments sought broader access and planned classified inference infrastructure, with a reported $9 billion US request for GPUs and support systems. Pope Leo XIV's Magnifica Humanitas defends human dignity and labor, rejects AI personhood, and calls for data governance and policies keeping humans as the metric of success.

The AI Daily Br

videos.title: Beating the AI Doom Cycle
videos.description: AI inequality explored as access to frontier models becomes scarce and selectively allocated by security, compute, and government controls. The role of Mythos, distillation, and recent pricing shifts demonstrates how token scarcity and stricter KYC concentrate capabilities among major firms and allied states. Policy responses include security hardening, rapid data-center buildouts, international compute partnerships, and contingency strategies for middle powers to avoid a haves-and-have-nots fut
